title: Judy Robe & Spirits Awards
intro: The Judy Robe & Spirits Awards celebrate the heart of every PYT production. Presented each season, they honor the performers whose dedication, generosity, and ensemble spirit make our shows possible. This page is a placeholder description — staff can edit this text and the list of past winners through the CMS.
winners_blurb: Three decades of outstanding young performers. (Placeholder entries below — edit, add, or remove winners through the CMS.)
